name: 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP
about: 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is a type of general medicine that helps lower high blood pressure. These tablets contain 40 mg of Olmesartan Medoxomil, which is an angiotensin receptor blocker (ARB) that relaxes blood vessels and improves blood flow. The tablets come in a solid form and are suitable for individuals who have difficulty swallowing capsules. These tablets are manufactured in India and are recommended to be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is 40 mg.

faq.q: What is the physical form of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP?
faq.a: The physical form of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is tablets.

faq.q: What is the drug type of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP?
faq.a: 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is a type of general medicine.

faq.q: How should 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the origin of 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP?
faq.a: 40 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is manufactured in India.
